workspace_filesystem.name: Manus Workspace Filesystem
workspace_filesystem.description: Direct POSIX filesystem at /home/ubuntu/ — persistent across sessions
workspace_filesystem.notes: Proven in DIRECT-FILE-RUNTIME-PROBE-GATE and MANUS-WORKSPACE-PROBE-GATE. Full lifecycle supported. Recommended canonical backend.
workspace_filesystem.limitation: Manus-side only — external LLM (ChatGPT) cannot write directly without manual upload bridge or API task

mcp_bridge.name: MCP Bridge (manus-mcp-cli)
mcp_bridge.description: Model Context Protocol CLI — can configure MCP servers to expose resources/tools
mcp_bridge.notes: manus-mcp-cli installed and functional. No servers configured. If a file-system MCP server is configured pointing to /home/ubuntu/yos-bus-runtime, this becomes a direct write path from external LLMs.
mcp_bridge.limitation: Requires MCP server setup and configuration — not zero-config

manus_cli_tools.name: Manus CLI Tools
manus_cli_tools.description: Set of manus-* CLI utilities available in sandbox
manus_cli_tools.notes: manus-upload-file uploads to S3 CDN (public URL, 48h TTL) — not a BUS backend. manus-heartbeat manages HTTP cron jobs for webdev. manus-touchpoint-fuse is telemetry/session bridge. CLI tools are Manus-internal utilities, not BUS transport.

manus_api_file_upload.name: Manus API — file.upload / S3 CDN
manus_api_file_upload.description: POST /v2/file.upload — uploads to S3, returns upload_url. manus-upload-file uploads to files.manuscdn.com CDN.
manus_api_file_upload.notes: Can deliver a packet as a file URL. Cannot implement inbox/workspace/outbox lifecycle. 48h TTL makes it unsuitable for persistent BUS state. Useful as one-shot delivery mechanism only.
manus_api_file_upload.limitation: No workspace write, no lifecycle, 48h TTL, no stable addressing

manus_api_task_create.name: Manus API — task.create / task.sendMessage
manus_api_task_create.description: POST /v2/task.create — creates a Manus task with message + optional file attachments. Can target agent-default-main_task.
manus_api_task_create.notes: ChatGPT can call Manus API task.create with a packet as message content or file attachment. Manus agent receives and processes it. This is the primary external-write path. Requires Manus API key. Async (not synchronous inbox).
manus_api_task_create.limitation: Async — not synchronous inbox polling. Requires Manus agent to process and place packet into BUS. Rate limited at 10/min.

manus_api_webhooks.name: Manus API — Webhooks
manus_api_webhooks.description: POST /v2/webhook.create — register HTTP endpoint for task lifecycle events (task_created, task_stopped)
manus_api_webhooks.notes: Webhooks enable last-mile notification: when Manus completes an MPR, webhook fires to ChatGPT/external system. Requires public endpoint. Excellent for BUS last-mile (report delivery notification).
manus_api_webhooks.limitation: Requires public HTTPS endpoint to receive events. Not available in sandbox without expose.

manus_api_structured_output.name: Manus API — Structured Output
manus_api_structured_output.description: Pass structured_output_schema to task.create/sendMessage — agent returns JSON result
manus_api_structured_output.notes: Enables ChatGPT to receive MPR as structured JSON via task.listMessages. Excellent for last-mile report delivery. Combine with task.create for full BUS.write + BUS.read_latest_report loop.

manus_api_connectors.name: Manus API — Connectors (252 available)
manus_api_connectors.description: connector.list — 252 connectors available, 0 enabled. Includes GitHub, Google Drive, Notion, Airtable, etc.
manus_api_connectors.notes: GitHub connector enables Git-based BUS transport without manual git operations. Google Drive enables cloud folder transport. Notion enables structured memory transport. All require connector auth setup.

manus_api_projects.name: Manus API — Projects
manus_api_projects.description: project.create — durable shared instructions and context across tasks
manus_api_projects.notes: Projects provide durable instructions but not file/packet transport. Not a BUS backend.

git_transport.name: Git Transport (GitHub)
git_transport.description: Git commit/push to yj000018/YOS — canonical fallback BUS transport
git_transport.notes: Proven canonical fallback. Versioned, auditable. Slower than filesystem. Requires ChatGPT to have GitHub access. Currently operational.
git_transport.limitation: Slow (commit/push latency). May trigger GitHub confirmations for large commits.

manus_heartbeat.name: Manus Heartbeat (HTTP Cron)
manus_heartbeat.description: manus-heartbeat — manages HTTP cron jobs that POST to webdev site /api/scheduled/* endpoints
manus_heartbeat.notes: Heartbeat is for webdev scheduled tasks, not BUS transport. Could trigger BUS operations indirectly via scheduled endpoint.

manus_touchpoint_fuse.name: Manus Touchpoint Fuse
manus_touchpoint_fuse.description: Internal telemetry/session bridge — OTEL + Sentry instrumentation for sandbox runtime
manus_touchpoint_fuse.notes: Internal telemetry tool. Not a BUS backend candidate.
